recommendations.title: The Entity
recommendations.overview: A single mom is raped by an invisible force. Her psychiatrist believes the experience stems from childhood trauma, while she knows something supernatural is at play.

recommendations.title: Ladybugs
recommendations.overview: To climb the corporate ladder to success, a businessman agrees to coach his company's all-girl soccer team with the help of his secret weapon: his fiancee's son.

recommendations.title: The Ipcress File
recommendations.overview: Sly and dry intelligence agent Harry Palmer is tasked with investigating British Intelligence security, and is soon enmeshed in a world of double-dealing, kidnap and murder when he finds a traitor operating at the heart of the secret service.

recommendations.title: Superman IV: The Quest for Peace

recommendations.title: What We Did on Our Holiday

recommendations.title: The Hangover
recommendations.overview: When three friends finally come to after a raucous night of bachelor-party revelry, they find a baby in the closet and a tiger in the bathroom. But they can't seem to locate their best friend, Doug – who's supposed to be tying the knot. Launching a f

recommendations.title: Kill Bill: Vol. 1
recommendations.overview: An assassin is shot by her ruthless employer, Bill, and other members of their assassination circle – but she lives to plot her vengeance.

recommendations.title: Welcome to the Rileys

recommendations.title: The Town
